query:
UPDATE draw_records 
SET drawTime = '115/03/15 13:05:00',
    numbers = '[3, 13, 14, 28, 32, 34, 36, 46, 49, 52, 54, 63, 64, 66, 67, 70, 72, 77, 78, 79]',
    superNumber = 3,
    total = 1042,
    bigSmall = 'big',
    oddEven = 'even',
    plate = 'upper'
WHERE drawNumber = '115014892';
